task_completion.description: Create a rectangular room labeled 'Data Center Room 101' with a 'Raised Floor (24 in)' indicator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangle representing the room on the EdrawMax canvas, with text labels 'Data Center Room 101' and 'Raised Floor (24 in)' clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Add an entry door on the bottom wall and a Fire Panel near the door.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A door symbol or gap on the bottom edge of the room rectangle, and a shape or text indicating a 'Fire Panel' located close to the entry door.

task_completion.description: Arrange four server racks in a 2x2 grid in the center, properly labeled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct rectangular shapes in the center of the room arranged in a 2x2 layout (two rows, two columns), explicitly labeled 'Rack A1', 'Rack A2', 'Rack B1', and 'Rack B2'.

task_completion.description: Add text labels for 'Hot Aisle' and 'Cold Aisle' in the correct locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text reading 'Hot Aisle' located between the two rows of server racks, and 'Cold Aisle' text located on the outer sides of the rack grid.

task_completion.description: Place and label CRAC units on the side walls and a PDU in the bottom-left corner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes labeled 'CRAC-1' positioned on the left wall, 'CRAC-2' on the right wall, and 'PDU-A' positioned in the bottom-left corner of the room.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an EDDX file and export as a PNG file to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: EdrawMax save/export dialogs showing the paths '/home/ga/Documents/datacenter_floorplan.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/datacenter_floorplan.png', or a file manager window showing these two files successfully created.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the floor plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax application interface being actively used with tools and canvas visible, rather than terminal commands generating the files.

integrity.description: The agent manually placed shapes and text on the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progression of the diagram being built step-by-step on the canvas, rather than just opening a pre-made file or pasting a complete image from the web.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export/save functionality to generate the final files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save and Export dialog boxes from EdrawMax are visible in the screenshots, rather than terminal 'mv' or 'cp' commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are exactly '/home/ga/Documents/datacenter_floorplan.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/datacenter_floorplan.png'. The diagram must contain the exact text labels: 'Rack A1', 'Rack A2', 'Rack B1', 'Rack B2', 'CRAC-1', 'CRAC-2', 'PDU-A', and 'Data Center Room 101'.
